<!-- Thanks for contributing to envup! Keep PRs focused: one change per PR. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New module
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/lint.sh` passes (shellcheck + `bash -n`)
- [ ] `scripts/test.sh` passes (bats unit + integration)
- [ ] `envup doctor` passes (if a module changed)
- [ ] Preserves the core guarantees: backup / idempotent / reversible / dry-run
- [ ] Docs updated (README / CONTRIBUTING / ARCHITECTURE / CHANGELOG) where relevant
- [ ] Commit history is tidy (one logical change; see CONTRIBUTING)
